issue: error notifying scheduler about finished query
root_cause: Scheduler service at 127.0.0.1:9095 closing connections prematurely (EOF errors)
recommended_fixes: Add connection pooling with retry logic and exponential backoff
Implement health checks before attempting notification
Add connection timeout and keep-alive settings
Verify scheduler service is running and healthy

implementation_plan.phase_1: Add connection pool manager with pooling configuration
implementation_plan.phase_2: Implement retry mechanism with exponential backoff (3 retries, max 5s)
implementation_plan.phase_3: Add health check endpoint for scheduler service
implementation_plan.phase_4: Configure TCP keep-alive and connection timeouts
